vocab.meaning: có tầm nhìn hướng ra (từ trên cao)
vocab.example: There's a quaint little cafe on the hilltop that looks out over the entire valley.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không khí, cảnh đẹp)
vocab.example: I love heading to the rooftop garden just to soak up the stunning sunset after a long day.

vocab.meaning: nằm ẩn mình ở một nơi yên tĩnh, hẻo lánh
vocab.example: There is a hidden waterfall tucked away in the forest that offers some truly breathtaking views.

vocab.meaning: đi dạo thong thả dọc theo
vocab.example: Residents often stroll along the promenade to enjoy the refreshing sea breeze and the coastal scenery.

vocab.meaning: đi về phía, hướng về phía
vocab.example: If you're looking for a panoramic view of the skyline, you should head for the observation deck downtown.
There are several scenic viewpoints dotted around the outskirts of the city that are perfect for photography.

vocab.meaning: thưởng ngoạn, say sưa ngắm nhìn cái gì đó đẹp đẽ
vocab.example: You can go to the botanical gardens to feast your eyes on the vibrant colors of the seasonal flowers.
We spent the whole afternoon sitting on the cliffs, just taking in the spectacular view of the ocean.

vocab.meaning: tách biệt khỏi (sự ồn ào, náo nhiệt)
vocab.example: I prefer visiting the lakeside because it's completely cut off from the hustle and bustle of city life.

vocab.meaning: mở ra (một tầm nhìn rộng lớn)
vocab.example: As you reach the top of the trail, the landscape suddenly opens up into a magnificent plateau.
